steps.t: The Fox and Fiddle can be found in the village of Nobottle. You should talk to Arno Diggle in The Fox and Fiddle.
Nails and planks of wood can be found scattered around the village of Nobottle. You should collect nails and planks of wood for the display case.
The Fox and Fiddle can be found in the village of Nobottle. You should build the display case in The Fox and Fiddle where Arno Diggle said you could b…
The Fox and Fiddle can be found in the village of Nobottle. You set the forgotten relics in the display case.
Both Hubo Clayhanger and Arno Diggle can be found in The Fox and Fiddle. You should talk to Hubo Clayhanger and Arno Diggle.
